input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.12.6.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.12.6.1
            TITLE: a green flag or light signal will give the approval to begin the run

            CONTENT:
            rule D.12.6.1: A Green Flag or light signal will give the approval to begin the run
D.12.6.1 A Green Flag or light signal will give the approval to begin the run

final_answer: A Green Flag or light signal will give the approval to begin the run
